title: Add --blocking flag to bs relate and bs add
content:
**Files:** `bin/cmd_relate.ml`, `bin/cmd_add.ml`, `lib/service/relation_service.ml`, `test-integration/relate_expect.ml`, `test-integration/add_expect.ml`.

**Description:**
Add a `--blocking` flag to `bs relate` and `bs add` so users can explicitly mark any relation as blocking.

CLI behavior:
- `--depends-on TARGET` creates a `depends-on` unidirectional relation with `blocking:true` (unchanged default behavior, now explicit in the stored field).
- `--related-to TARGET` creates a `related-to` bidirectional relation with `blocking:false` (default).
- `--uni KIND,TARGET` creates a custom unidirectional relation with `blocking:false` (default).
- `--bi KIND,TARGET` creates a custom bidirectional relation with `blocking:false` (default).
- `--blocking` flag: when present, sets `blocking:true` on all non-depends-on relations created in that invocation. `--depends-on` is always blocking regardless.

Update `Relation_service.build_specs` to accept and propagate the `--blocking` flag.

**TDD note:**
- RED: Write integration tests: `bs relate SOURCE --related-to TARGET --blocking` creates a blocking related-to relation. `bs relate SOURCE --uni custom,TARGET --blocking` creates blocking custom relation. Verify via `bs show` that `[blocking]` annotation appears. `bs add todo TITLE --related-to TARGET --blocking` does the same inline. Run tests, confirm failures.

title: Extract _with_flush_map in kb_service.ml
content: kb_service.ml: next and claim manually inline the mark_dirty/call/flush pattern that _with_flush implements. Extract _with_flush_map that accepts an error-mapping parameter so claim_error can wrap sync errors via Service_error.

title: Parameterize exit_with with optional exit code
content: Common.exit_with hardcodes exit 1. Callers needing a different code (exit 123 for stuck queue) bypass the helper and duplicate its formatting. Parameterize with ?(code=1) and use ~code:123 in cmd_next.ml. Generalized principle: shared helpers should parameterize behavioral choices with sensible defaults rather than hardcoding them.

title: Remove redundant sort in next
content: mutation_service.ml next re-sorts todos by Identifier.raw_id, but Repository.Todo.list already returns results ordered by niceid. Remove the redundant sort.

title: Simplify next function structure
content: mutation_service.ml next has match sorted with [] -> Ok None then a nested try_claim. Fold the empty-list case into the recursive function so stuck_count=0 && list=[] returns Ok None directly.

title: Bug: --json commands output plain-text stderr on error instead of JSON
content: Every command supporting --json falls back to plain-text stderr on error, providing no JSON output. Machine consumers get nothing parseable on failure. Commands affected: list, show, add, relate, resolve, archive, flush, rebuild. The new claim and next commands correctly output JSON errors, but all existing commands need the same treatment.

title: Extract shared claim output into Cmd_claim
content: Extract print_claimed_todo helper into cmd_claim.ml as a public function. cmd_next.ml calls Cmd_claim.print_claimed_todo and Cmd_claim.claim_error_msg/json instead of duplicating the logic. Follows existing cmd_close→Cmd_resolve pattern.

title: Update §6 docs and fix cmd_init.ml JSON errors
content: Update docs/bin/principles.md §6 to state errors are JSON-formatted when --json is passed. Fix cmd_init.ml error path to use exit_with_error ~json for consistency.

title: Factor cmd_add.ml run_note/run_todo duplication
content: Factor run_note and run_todo in cmd_add.ml into a shared helper parameterized by entity type and service functions, eliminating the near-duplicate ~80 lines.

title: Remove trivial wrapper in cmd_update.ml
content: Remove the trivial resolve_update_content wrapper and call Common.resolve_content_source directly.

title: Fix non-JSON error paths in claim/next --show
content: Change cmd_claim.ml:64 and cmd_next.ml:33 to use exit_with_error ~json instead of exit_with, so --json callers get structured error output.

title: Add annotations to cmd_init.ml examples
content: Add short annotations before each example in cmd_init.ml EXAMPLES section per bin/ principle §8.

title: Deduplicate identifier parsing in Item_service.find
content: Item_service.find (lines 73-82) re-implements the niceid-then-typeid parsing from Parse.identifier. Refactor to call Parse.identifier and dispatch on the result.

title: Consolidate _map_relation_repo_error into Item_service
content: _map_relation_repo_error is duplicated in query_service.ml, mutation_service.ml, and relation_service.ml. Move into Item_service alongside map_todo_repo_error and map_note_repo_error.

title: Extract blocked-todo detection into Service.Dependency
content: query_service._is_blocked and mutation_service._is_blocked implement the same domain concept differently. Extract into a new Service.Dependency module with a shared function.

title: Expose sort_key from Jsonl for sync_service
content: sync_service._record_sort_key duplicates jsonl._sort_key_*. Expose a sort_key function from Jsonl taking an entity_record, and have sync_service use it.

title: Fix stale Note_data.t doc reference in repository/note.mli
content: repository/note.mli:5 references Note_data.t which does not exist. Change to Data.Note.t.

title: Add state-based assertions to repo tests
content: Add query_rows/query_count SQL assertions to note_repo_expect.ml and todo_repo_expect.ml happy paths. Requires making query helpers available to the repository test layer (either promote test_helpers or adapt repo tests to use Root.init like relation_repo_expect.ml does).

title: Add Fun.protect cleanup to repo tests
content: Wrap each repo test body in Fun.protect ~finally for db cleanup, or introduce a with_db helper analogous to with_root.

title: Extract duplicated pp_error to test_helpers
content: Extract pp_item_error to test_helpers.ml and replace local pp_error definitions in mutation_service_expect.ml, relation_service_expect.ml, kb_service_expect.ml, query_service_expect.ml, lifecycle_expect.ml.

title: Extract duplicated with_*_service wrappers
content: Add a generic with_service helper to test_helpers.ml that takes a service constructor, and replace the 6 duplicated with_*_service wrappers across service test files.

title: Deduplicate relation_repo helpers with test_helpers
content: relation_repo_expect.ml defines its own query_rows and with_root that duplicate test_helpers versions. Share via a common test-helpers library or promote helpers to top-level test/ library.

title: Remove leading underscores from used test helpers
content: Remove leading underscores from used functions: _with_sync, _unwrap_sync, _unwrap_todo, _unwrap_note in sync_service_expect.ml; _unwrap_note/_unwrap_todo/_unwrap_niceid in repo test files; _init/_expect_ok_unit in config_expect.ml.

title: Replace custom starts_with with stdlib
content: Replace custom starts_with in test_helpers.ml with String.starts_with ~prefix from OCaml stdlib (available since 4.13, project uses 5.4).
